goals: Store explicit preference for mainstream blockbuster films
Search memory for past film-related discussions
List all stored memories to verify preferences were saved
Delete an incorrect or outdated memory entry

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and precise. Prefers clear, structured information over vague or artistic descriptions. Values facts and mainstream consensus.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but has no knowledge of semantic search, vector databases, or AI memory systems. Treats this like a simple note-taking or preference-tracking tool.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their film preference, verified it was saved, searched for related context, and cleaned up any unwanted memory entries.
